mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pw_statistics WHERE dimension_type = 'CAMPAIGN' AND dimension_value = CAST(#{campaignId} AS CHAR) ORDER BY stat_date DESC
SELECT * FROM pw_statistics WHERE dimension_type = 'CAMPAIGN' GROUP BY dimension_value ORDER BY SUM(total_count) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pw_statistics (dimension_type, dimension_value, campaign_id, prize_id, total_count, win_count, grant_count, stat_date) VALUES (#{dimensionType}, #{dimensionValue}, #{campaignId}, #{prizeId}, #{totalCount}, #{winCount}, #{grantCount}, #{statDate})

INSERT INTO pw_statistics (dimension_type, dimension_value, campaign_id, total_count, stat_date) VALUES (#{dimensionType}, #{dimensionValue}, #{campaignId}, 1, #{statDate}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_count = total_count + 1

INSERT INTO pw_statistics (dimension_type, dimension_value, campaign_id, win_count, stat_date) VALUES (#{dimensionType}, #{dimensionValue}, #{campaignId}, 1, #{statDate}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE win_count = win_count + 1

INSERT INTO pw_statistics (dimension_type, dimension_value, campaign_id, grant_count, stat_date) VALUES (#{dimensionType}, #{dimensionValue}, #{campaignId}, 1, #{statDate}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE grant_count = grant_count + 1
